body:
Release prepared and pushed. Branch gsta-81/ci-infra-skeleton contains the CI infra skeleton changes and a version bump to 0.1.2. I do not have a GitHub token in this environment to create the PR automatically.

Suggested PR title: chore(release): bump versions to 0.1.2

Suggested PR body summary:
- Bump package versions to 0.1.2 across root and workspace packages
- Add CHANGELOG.md documenting the release
- Includes branch-specific changes (CI infra skeleton): removals of some tsconfig/frontend files and added docs/scripts

Verification performed: ran repo test script (placeholder - no tests configured). Commit: 671fec2.

Create the PR via GitHub UI: https://github.com/AI-LLM-World/AI-Tools-Library/compare/main...gsta-81/ci-infra-skeleton
Or run locally with gh CLI:
  gh pr create --base main --head gsta-81/ci-infra-skeleton --title "chore(release): bump versions to 0.1.2" --body "See summary in issue comments."

If you want me to open the PR, provide a GITHUB_TOKEN or GH_TOKEN in the environment and I will create it now.
